lyrics.text: One I love two she loves
lyrics.translation: 一瓣花，我爱她  二瓣花，她爱我

lyrics.text: Three she's true to me
lyrics.translation: 三瓣花，真爱唯我永不换

lyrics.text: All of my friends fell out with me
lyrics.translation: 所有朋友都与我吵翻

lyrics.text: Because I kept your company
lyrics.translation: 只因我死心与你相伴

lyrics.text: But let them say whatever they will
lyrics.translation: 由他们说去吧

lyrics.text: I love my love with a free good will
lyrics.translation: 爱我所爱 随我所愿

lyrics.text: One I love two she loves
lyrics.translation: 一瓣花，我爱她  二瓣花，她爱我

lyrics.text: Three she's true to me
lyrics.translation: 三瓣花，真爱唯我永不换

lyrics.text: They tell me he's poor they tell me he's young
lyrics.translation: 朋友数落他一文不名 还对我说他太过稚嫩

lyrics.text: I tell them all to hold their tongue
lyrics.translation: 免开尊口 却是我的回应

lyrics.text: If they could part the sand from the sea
lyrics.translation: 即使他们能把沙与海水分开

lyrics.text: They never could part my love from me
lyrics.translation: 也无法阻止我对他的爱

lyrics.text: One I love two she loves
lyrics.translation: 一瓣花，我爱她  二瓣花，她爱我

lyrics.text: Three she's true to me
lyrics.translation: 三瓣花，真爱唯我永不换

lyrics.text: When I'm awake I find no rest
lyrics.translation: 当我醒着，心境难平

lyrics.text: Until his head lies on my breast
lyrics.translation: 直到他枕在我的胸口

lyrics.text: When I'm asleep I'm dreaming of
lyrics.translation: 于是我昏昏欲睡，梦中

lyrics.text: My own my dear my one true love
lyrics.translation: 有我，有他，有我纯真的爱情

lyrics.text: One I love two she loves
lyrics.translation: 一瓣花，我爱她  二瓣花，她爱我

lyrics.text: Three she's true to me
lyrics.translation: 三瓣花，真爱唯我永不换

lyrics.text: When the fire to ice will run
lyrics.translation: 当火变成冰

lyrics.text: And when the tide no longer turns
lyrics.translation: 当潮汐不再涨落

lyrics.text: And when the rocks melt with the sun
lyrics.translation: 当太阳消融了岩石

lyrics.text: My love for you will have just begun
lyrics.translation: 我对你的爱才刚刚开始

lyrics.translation: 一瓣花，我爱她  二瓣花，她爱我

lyrics.text: Three she's true to me
lyrics.translation: 三瓣花，真爱唯我永不换
